About

Hello, World (about me)

July 30, 2023

Hello reader, thanks for visting my blog! This is a quick intro to share some background about myself and ensure everything is working correctly :)

I’m Neal Chandra and I’m currently a software engineer at Discord, working on the Clyde AI (chatbot) team.

I’m creating this blog to share learnings from my exploration with AI, with a focus on open source efforts such as around Meta’s Llama family of models, and to document some investigations I’m doing in the space.

I plan to share my thoughts on other topics in tech, but also hopefully some other areas of interest, such as sports, travel, and finance. I’m particularly interested in the NBA and in the meta around the salary cap and front-office decision making. Hopefully this surface will help push me to finally organize and share those thoughts.

Thanks for reading and I hope you find the content useful and interesting!

Neal Chandra
